subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The servant of the True One, thy noble descendant Badi'u'llah, hath made fair mention of thee; therefore I pen this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله بنده حق سلیل جلیل تو بدیع الله ذکر جمیل تو نمود لهذا بتحریر این
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
